description: Java Spring Boot app that calls logger.info() with user-controlled input — the vulnerable pattern for CVE-2021-44228 (Log4Shell JNDI injection via log4j-core). Tree-sitter call-graph analysis confirms the vulnerable symbol is reachable.

findings.human_justification: logger.info() is called with user-controlled query parameter in App.java. Tree-sitter confirms the vulnerable log4j function is reachable from the REST endpoint.
